description: This pipeline applies thresholding and morphological operations to preprocessed images. The main steps include applying thresholding, performing morphological operations, and then outputting the resulting images.

c909f897-2246-430f-aeb0-962a162f4c2c.name: ij1-analyze-find-particles2d
c909f897-2246-430f-aeb0-962a162f4c2c.description: Converts mask images into ROI by applying a connected components algorithm and generates measurements. Please note that this algorithm will always trace the external object boundaries and convert them into polygonal ROIs. This means that holes will be closed. This node requires a thresholded image as input and will extract measurements from the thresholded image. If you already have ROI available and want measurements, use 'Extract ROI statistics'.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

9b945fba-c8b2-4c5f-b304-879dec252d2f.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
9b945fba-c8b2-4c5f-b304-879dec252d2f.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

77183ad8-c7cf-4ab6-af2c-323c4fdfc865.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
77183ad8-c7cf-4ab6-af2c-323c4fdfc865.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6a8fdcfd-2321-468f-8d71-bcd936a37092.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
6a8fdcfd-2321-468f-8d71-bcd936a37092.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

117a0b2c-8a1a-4c3b-826d-cfb13db65436.name: ij1-roi-set-properties
117a0b2c-8a1a-4c3b-826d-cfb13db65436.description: Sets properties of all Roi to a user-defined value.

7bb4bae0-509b-49cf-aa0e-153b24590c18.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
7bb4bae0-509b-49cf-aa0e-153b24590c18.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
